summary: Classified the ten inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. The validator identified #74083 as security-sensitive, so that exact PR is routed to central security handling without mutating it. Instant close/low-signal close/fix/merge paths are disabled, and no shared canonical was invented. Eight non-security PRs should remain open without mutation; two focused PRs need exact maintainer decisions before any merge/finalization path.
